description: Two-dimensional planar diffuser in a low-speed air duct; symmetric about the centerline.

geometry.contour: h(xi) = h1 + (h2 - h1) * ((1 - b) * xi + b * smoothstep(remap(xi, c))), see instruction.md

notes: Cp = (p_outlet - p_inlet) / (0.5 * rho * U_inlet^2), duct inlet plane to outlet plane.
Separation risk is worst at the lowest operating velocity.
